Table battle with columns id (int), name (text), date (text), bulgarian_commander (text), latin_commander (text), result (text)
Table death with columns caused_by_ship_id (int), id (int), note (text), killed (int), injured (int) — foreign keys: caused_by_ship_id → ship(id)
Table ship with columns lost_in_battle (int), id (int), name (text), tonnage (text), ship_type (text), location (text), disposition_of_ship (text) — foreign keys: lost_in_battle → battle(id)
